---
title: "Suits Viewership Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Introduction

*Suits* is an American legal drama television series created by Aaron Korsh. The show premiered on USA Network in 2011 and follows talented college dropout Mike Ross as he works with lawyer Harvey Specter despite never attending law school.

![](images/suits-logo.jpg)

# Load Libraries and Data

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

suits <- read_csv("data/suits_viewership.csv")

suits
```

```{r}
colnames(suits)
```

AI was used to perform the following summary

# Summary Statistics

```{r}
summary_stats <- suits %>%
  summarise(
    average_viewers = mean(Average_Viewers_Millions),
    max_viewers = max(Average_Viewers_Millions),
    min_viewers = min(Average_Viewers_Millions)
  )

summary_stats
```

The average viewership across all seasons was approximately `r round(summary_stats$average_viewers, 2)` million viewers.

# Viewership Over Time

```{r}
ggplot(suits, aes(x = Season, y = Average_Viewers_Millions)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "darkblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Suits Average Viewership by Season",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Average Viewers (Millions)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Season-to-Season Changes

```{r}
suits_changes <- suits %>%
  mutate(Change = Average_Viewers_Millions - lag(Average_Viewers_Millions))

ggplot(suits_changes, aes(x = Season, y = Change)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Season-to-Season Change in Viewership",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Change in Millions"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Analysis

```{r}
decline_4_5 <- suits$Average_Viewers_Millions[5] -
  suits$Average_Viewers_Millions[4]
```

The show experienced a noticeable decline in audience over time. Between Seasons 4 and 5, average viewership changed by `r round(decline_4_5, 2)` million viewers.

The highest average audience occurred during Season `r suits$Season[which.max(suits$Average_Viewers_Millions)]`.

The lowest average audience occurred during Season `r suits$Season[which.min(suits$Average_Viewers_Millions)]`.
